programme.title: Drive Tv
programme.desc: (G) Emma splits the Apple Isle right down the middle and take a Genesis GV70 from Launceston to Hobart

programme.title: Drive Tv
programme.desc: Drive provides automotive reviews, car culture stories, and expert insights on vehicles and the motoring industry.

programme.title: Drive Tv: Vehicle Insights
programme.desc: Drive provides automotive reviews, car culture stories, and expert insights on vehicles and the motoring industry.

programme.title: Drive Tv
programme.desc: (G) Emma takes the tough new GWM Cannon Ute on an adventure through country Victoria, meeting a few not-so-local locals along the way.
